title: cyclosorus urdanetensis
intro: Cyclosorus urdanetensis is a species of fern, specifically a type of leafy green plant belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus urdanetensis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting liver health. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve making tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosing.
